name: Realm of Danger!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ユーマリア<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target "Danger!" monsters you control with card effects during the turn they are Special Summoned. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Danger!" monster you control; while you control that face-up monster and this face-up card, that monster can attack directly, also your opponent's monsters cannot target it for attacks, but it does not prevent your opponent from attacking you directly.
eff: Your opponent cannot target "Danger!" monsters you control with card effects during the turn they are Special Summoned. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Danger!" monster you control; while you control that face-up monster and this face-up card, that monster can attack directly, also your opponent's monsters cannot target it for attacks, but it does not prevent your opponent from attacking you directly.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
Does not prevent the opponent from attacking directly
